title: QuestionDefinition
description: One entry in configs/questions.yaml (after YAML→JSON conversion). The full registry is loaded by survey2agent.extraction.question_spec.QUESTIONS.

question_text.description: Natural-language prompt presented to extractors / LLMs.

type.description: Reasoning family (A=Arbitration, B=Identity, C=Plan-Reality, D=Trend, E=Causal, F=Missing-Data, G=Annotation, Ctrl=Control).

topic.description: Domain (e.g. sleep, work, diet, social, exercise).

answer_space.description: Full label list including any edge cases. Must NOT contain 'SKIP'.

ordered_labels.description: Substantive labels in the rank order used by ordinal_encoding and BCF/ABF bias shifts. This is not always the human-readable numeric display order for derived-count questions. Required iff answer_space_type=='ordinal'.

edge_options.description: Labels treated as factual edge cases (not abstain).
